meaning: adj.为使颤动而装在弹簧上的,用弹簧颤动的
examples: Just an hour from Montreal, Mont-Tremblant was the country's first resort to install a chairlift.
Quebec is home to one of Canada's oldest and best known resorts, Mont-Tremblant.
"I'm having fun, " Bronfman says, still finding time to live an active outdoor life, skiing at Mont Tremblant and fishing at Cap Nord.
